item.title: Mastering Interview Embellishments 🎤 • Highlight skills relevant to the job. • Use: “I led a team to increase efficiency by 20%.” • Frame experience to show growth and learning. • Focus on achievements, not just duties. • Ensure embellishments align with facts. How can you ethically enhance your interview storytelling without crossing the line? #interviews #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Mastering Interview Embellishments 🎤 • Highlight skills relevant to the job. • Use: “I led a team to increase efficiency by 20%.” • Frame experience to show growth and learning. • Focus on achievements, not just duties. • Ensure embellishments align with facts. How can you ethically enhance your interview storytelling without crossing the line? #interviews #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
